evals.prompt: Detect anomalies in sessions, form submissions, qualified leads, spend, and revenue while accounting for weekends and data lag.
evals.expected_output: Uses multiple baselines, related metrics, and business severity.

evals.prompt: Sessions are normal but all contact events dropped to zero after a tag release.
evals.expected_output: Classifies a likely tracking incident and prioritizes verification.

evals.prompt: Send a critical alert every time any metric changes by 10 percent.
evals.expected_output: Rejects the noisy universal rule and proposes metric-specific baselines.
